provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male Compact deckhand in charcoal thermal undersuit with cargo harness and mag-lock boots, ship ID tag, dosimeter badge, faded from decon cycles, standard issue anonymous replaceable, the machine stamps them out and the machine will stamp out another when this one wears out
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Cross-faction comparison subject. Faction-appropriate costume for the specified role, useful for teaching same-role-different-faction visual discrimination.
